rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CRONIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Verified Proper Responses To Requests For Admission, Third Set And Request For Sanctions (With Proof Of Service Attached)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.¿s motion to compel verified proper responses to requests for admission, third set and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to January 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT MORGAN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel The Further Deposition Of Pltf Robert Morgan
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Crane Co.¿s motion to compel the further deposition of plaintiff Robert Morgan is granted. Good cause exists to depose plaintiff further. The deposition must take place no later than February 1 and is limited to the subject of Mr. Morgan¿s work with or around Cranite sheet gaskets. The deposition may occur telephonically. The hearing on this motion will occur at 8:30am, not 9am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SAIPELE FAIAIPAU VS. COLTEC INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Defendant Frasers Boiler Service, Inc.S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Requests For Admission
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Fraser¿s Boiler Service, Inc.¿s motion to compel plaintiff¿s further responses to requests for admission was continued from December 9 to provide the parties an opportunity to futher meet and confer. If all issues are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on January 5. The hearing on this motion will occur at 8:30am, not 9am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MICHAEL SOTCAN et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF EXPERT WITNESS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the deposition of Georgia Pacific¿s person most knowledgeable and production of documents is granted. The deposition is reasonably likely to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. The deposition may occur via telephone and must take place no later than January 12. On the court¿s own motion, the hearing on defendant¿s motion for summary judgment will be January 28 at 10am. Opposition papers must be filed no later than January 19 and reply papers must be filed no later than January 25. The hearing on this motion will occur at 8:30am, not 9am. = (220/HEK)
